titleStmt.title: SII 17.599: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 599. (A.R. No. 554 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription mentions the 57th day of the 24th year of Tribhuvaṉavīradēva who is referred to as nam tōḻaṉ by the god.

It records the redistribution of tax-free lands made according to the order of the deity to the 100 āṇḍārs, serving in the temple at the request of Vīrarājēndrappallavaraiyaṉ and Tirumuttiṉ-śivigai-peṟṟāṉ, by god Śrī Pūrvvārūrvāsi, as the said āṇḍārs failed to distribute among themselves properly the lands previously allotted to them and quarelling left their land uncultivated. The lands lay in Śōḻa-Kēraḷanallūr in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, Virudarājabhayaṅkarachcharuppēdimaṅgalam and Kaḷachchāttaṅguḍi in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. Tiruvāykkēḻvi Aṇukkanambi, tirumandira ōlai Śrīnandikēśvara-mūvēndavēḷāṉ and tirumandira ōlai Tyāgavinōda-mūvēndaveḷāṉ figure as signatories in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī % yajjagattrayanirmmāṇatrāṇa nirvvāṇakāraṇam . tadidam śāsanam śambhoḥ śrīpūrvvārūravāsinaḥ nammai sevaippaṇṇi kumpiṭṭu Irukku Āṇṭārkaḷ per nūṟṟuvarkkum nam Aṭukkaḷaip puṟaṅkaḷāṉa Ūrkaḷil keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭu coḻakeraḷanallūril Aṭaitta nilam muppatemukkāle muṉṟumāviṉ kiḻ mukkāle Oru māmukkāṇiyum Aruvala
māṉa virutarājapayaṅkarac caruppetimaṅkalattu Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyili pottakappaṭi nilam kālum kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu kaḷaccāttaṅkuṭiyil Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyil Aṭaitta nilam mukkāle Orumāvarai muntirikai kiḻ Araiyum Āka nilam muppattoṉṟe kiḻThis empression kIḻ must be ignored. Otherwise the total cannot be accounted for. mukkāle nāṉmāvaraiye Araikkāṇi kiḻāṟumā mukkāṇiyil nām Ulāppotumiṭattu muṉpu kai
ytarum kuvaḷaiveliuṭaiyāṉ tiruttūḷi Aḻakiyāṉukku Aruvalattu Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyil pottakappaṭi Aṭaitta nilam kālum coḻakeraḷanallūril Aṭaitta nilam Irumāvaraiyum vayirākikaḷ Iruvarkku kaḷaccāttaṅkuṭiyil Aṭaitta nilam Araiye Irumāvarai muntirikaiyum nikki per toṇṇūṟṟeḻuvarkkum coḻakeraḷanallūr nilam mu
ppate mukkāle Araimāviṉ kiḻmukkāle Oru māmukkāṇiyum kaḷaccāttaṅkuṭiyil nilam nālumāviṉ kiḻaraiyum Ivarkaḷukku nāmaṭaitta nāḷmutal nellum nilamum taṅka ḷil Okka kūṟiṭāmaiyāle Āṇṭukaḷtoṟum Aḻittu kūṟiṭṭuvarukaiyāle Innilaṅkaḷ Oruvarum Uṟcākam paṇṇāmaiyāle taṭṭuppaṭṭuvārāniṉṟa teṉṟum taṅkaḷil nellum nilamum
Okkaccerttu certtapaṭiye Aṉupavikkapeṟa veṇumeṉṟu virarājen=tirappallavaraiyaṉum tirumuttiṉ civikai peṟṟāṉum namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil nam toḻaṉ tiripuvaṉaviraṉukku Irupattu nālāvatu mutal taṅkaḷil nellum nilamum Okkaccerttu Eḻuta virarājentirap pallavaraiyaṉum tirumuttiṉ civikai peṟṟāṉum Eḻuttiṭṭa kaiyyaṭaiypaṭiye Ivarkaḷuk kum Ivar
kaḷ vaṟkattāṟkum kāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyum Ākac coṉṉom tiruvāykkeḻvi Aṇukkanampi viṇṇappattāl Aruḷāl Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai śrīnantikeśvaramuventa veḷā ṉeṉṟum Ivai virarājentirap pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai tirumuttiṉ civikai peṟṟāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai tirumantira Olai tiyāka viṉota muventaveḷāṉ Eḻut teṉṟum yāṇṭu Irupattuṉālā
vatu ṉāḷ Aimpatteḻiṉāl prasādam ceytaruḷittu . Ip per ṉūṟṟuvaril Arivalattu nilattāl per Oṉṟum kaḷaccāttaṅ kuṭiyil per Iraṇṭum nikkip per toṇṉūṟ ṟeḻuvarkku coḻakeraḷanallūril nilamum nellum Okkac certtu per Iruvarkku kaiyyaṭai Oṉṟāka Ivvūrka kaṇakku Eyiṉūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttāl Eḻuti Ivaṉum virarājentirap pallavaraiyaṉum tirumuttiṉcivi
kai peṟṟāṉum Eḻuttiṭṭa kaiyyaṭaippaṭi kaiyyaṭai Oṉṟukku cetta kār maṟu nilam Irumā varaikku māttāl nellu Eṇkalaṉe Iru tūṇippatakkāka Irupattirukalane kuṟuṇiyum Oru pūnilam Oṉpatumā mukkāṇikkum māttāl nellu Aiṅkalaṉepatakku naāṉāḻiyā nellu Aimpatiṉ kalaṉe Iru tūṇi mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻi Āka nilam Araiye Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyāl varicaippaṭi ne
llu Eḻupattu mukkalaṉe Aṟunāḻi kuṟuṇivāci nellu Aṟukalaṉe kuṟuṇi Āka nellu Eḻupattoṉpatiṉ kalaṉe kuṟuṇi Aṟuṉāḻi celavaḷavu vācinellu Eḻukuṟuṇi Iruṉāḻi neṭṭāḷukku nellu Irutūṇik kuṟuṇi payaṟu kalaṉe Iruṉāḻikku nellu Iru kalaṉe nāṉāḻi Ūrkkaṇakkaṉukku Uṟaināḻikku viṭṭa nilattāl nellu Eḻukuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻi
taccaṉukku viṭṭa nilattāl nellu patakku nāvicaṉukku viṭṭa ṉilattāl nellu mukkuṟuṇi Oruṉāḻi Āka nellu Eḻupattoṉpatiṉ kalaṉe Eḻukuṟuṇi kaḷaccāttaṅkuṭiyil Opāti nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇi Āka per Iruvarkku nellu toṇṇūṟṟuk kalattukku kaiyyaṭai Oṉṟāka Eḻuti Eḻuttiṭṭatu
Digital edition of SII 17.599 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
